enonce.texte:
Observez les phrases suivantes. Le Past Perfect (had + participe passé) est utilisé pour montrer quelle action s'est déroulée en premier dans le passé.

Example: When I arrived at the party, John had already left. (John left first, then I arrived.)

questions.texte: Identify the action that happened FIRST in each sentence. (Identifiez l'action qui s'est produite EN PREMIER).

sousQuestions.texte: After the students had finished the exam, the teacher collected the copies.
She had never visited Maroua before she went there in 2022.

questions.texte: Complete the sentences using the Past Perfect simple form of the verbs in brackets. (Complétez avec le Past Perfect).

sousQuestions.texte: By the time the firemen arrived, the building ______ (already / collapse).
I realized that I ______ (lose) my wallet.
They ______ (never / see) such a beautiful sunset before their trip to the North.

questions.texte: Choose the correct option to complete the rule of tense concordance. (Choisissez la bonne option).

sousQuestions.texte: To express that one action happened before another in the past, we use: ______
sousQuestions.reponse: Past Perfect for the first action, Past Simple for the second.

sousQuestions.texte: Which conjunction is typically used to link the two actions?

intitule: Past Perfect vs Past Simple - Mise en situation (Compétence)

enonce.texte:
Lisez le paragraphe ci-dessous. Un journaliste raconte une cérémonie de remise de prix dans un lycée à Douala.

Texte : "When the Minister of Secondary Education arrived at the school, the principal had already welcomed the guests. The students had practiced their song three times before the ceremony started. Unfortunately, the guest speaker had missed his flight, so the director had to replace him at the last minute."

questions.texte: Justify the use of the Past Perfect in the sentence: "The students had practiced their song three times before the ceremony started." (Justifiez l'usage du Past Perfect).
questions.reponse: Because the practice (first action) was completely finished BEFORE the ceremony started (second action).

questions.texte: Rewrite the two following sentences as one sentence using 'After' or 'Before'. (Réécrivez en une seule phrase).

sousQuestions.texte: The principal welcomed the guests. The Minister arrived.
sousQuestions.reponse: The principal had welcomed the guests before the Minister arrived. OR After the principal had welcomed the guests, the Minister arrived.

sousQuestions.texte: The guest speaker missed his flight. The director replaced him.
sousQuestions.reponse: Because the guest speaker had missed his flight, the director replaced him.

intitule: Situations de regret et d'explication (Compétence - Vie pratique)

enonce.texte:
Situation : Vous êtes le délégué(e) de votre classe. Vous arrivez en retard au cours d'Anglais. Le professeur vous demande pourquoi.

Dialogue incomplet :
Teacher: Why are you late?
You: I am sorry, sir. By the time I got to the school gate, the school bus ______ (leave).
Teacher: Why didn't you take a taxi?
You: I ______ (spend) all my pocket money on books before I realized I needed transport.

questions.texte: Complete the dialogue with the correct Past Perfect forms. (Complétez le dialogue).
Explain what the Past Perfect expresses in the student's second sentence. (Expliquez l'usage).
questions.reponse: It expresses the cause (spending money) of a past situation (not taking a taxi). It shows that the spending happened BEFORE the moment of needing transport.

questions.texte: Transform the following sentence using 'By the time' (structure de la leçon). (Transformez la phrase).
questions.reponse: Initial: First I finished my homework, then I watched TV. -> Transformation: By the time I watched TV, I had already finished my homework.

sousQuestions.texte: First I finished my homework, then I watched TV.
sousQuestions.reponse: By the time I watched TV, I had already finished my homework.

intitule: Compréhension de la concordance des temps (Ressource Avancée)

enonce.texte: La concordance des temps au passé permet de clarifier la chronologie des événements dans un récit.

questions.texte: Put the events in the correct chronological order (1 = first, 2 = second). (Mettez dans l'ordre).

sousQuestions.texte: Event A: The police arrived. Event B: The thief had already escaped.
Event C: She turned on the TV. Event D: She had prepared dinner.

questions.texte: Correct the mistake in this sentence written by a student in Yaoundé. (Corrigez l'erreur).
questions.reponse: Initial: 'When I was seeing the accident, I called the police.' -> Correction: 'When I had seen the accident, I called the police.' OR 'When I saw the accident, I called the police.'

sousQuestions.texte: When I was seeing the accident, I called the police.
sousQuestions.reponse: When I had seen the accident, I called the police.
